message:
chore: Bump version to 1.10.3 - agentic-jujutsu v2.3.6 integration

Major Updates Since v1.10.2:

🚀 agentic-jujutsu v2.3.6 Release
- Multi-platform native binaries (8 platforms: Linux, macOS, Windows)
- Fixed macOS/Windows NAPI linking with .cargo/config.toml
- Complete CI/CD infrastructure via GitHub Actions
- Successfully published to npm with validation

🏢 Enterprise Features
- Production-ready Kubernetes controller
- Comprehensive deployment patterns documentation
- Native TypeScript billing system
- Economic system with metering and subscriptions

🧪 Testing & Validation
- E2B deployment validation (100% success rate)
- Comprehensive swarm scalability benchmarks
- Multi-platform CI/CD pipeline

📚 Documentation
- GitOps platform specification
- Enterprise features guide (Kubernetes, Billing, Deployment)
- NPM_TOKEN configuration guide

🔧 Fixes
- Billing CLI method name spacing
- TypeScript compilation errors
- Rust warnings resolution
- Package.json exports and validation

This release synchronizes the root package version with the published
agentic-flow subdirectory and includes all features developed since v1.10.2.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "agentic-flow",
-  "version": "1.10.2",
+  "version": "1.10.3",
   "description": "Production-ready AI agent orchestration platform with 66 specialized agents, 213 MCP tools, ReasoningBank learning memory, and autonomous multi-agent swarms. Built by @ruvnet with Claude Agent SDK, neural networks, memory persistence, GitHub integration, and distributed consensus protocols.",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
